function.name: _web_content
function.description: Fetch content from the specified URL. Supports GET/POST requests, custom request headers, timeout control, and request body settings. Only used for fetching public web resources.

url.description: The complete URL address to access (must be http or https)

method.description: HTTP request method, optional values: GET (fetch resource), POST (submit data)

timeout.description: Request timeout in milliseconds, 0 or not passing indicates using system default timeout

followRedirect.description: Whether to automatically follow HTTP redirects (3xx responses), default false

maxRedirectCount.description: Maximum redirect count, effective when followRedirect=true, default 10

charset.description: Response content charset (e.g., UTF-8), automatic detection if not provided

body.description: POST request body (usually JSON or plain text, used when method=POST)

form.description: POST form parameters (used when method=POST, choose either this or body)
